title: ToolTreaux Gardening Soil Sifter Fine and Coarse Planting Screens (Many Sizes)
description:
Whether you’re just beginning your gardening journey or already a seasoned green thumb, you need a sturdy gardening sifter. The ToolTreaux sifting classifiers are suitable for removing stones and refining soil before planting which will provide a better planting experience while improving efficiency in your garden.

Made of high-quality ABS plastic with 304 stainless steel mesh, the ToolTreaux gardening sifters are easy to use, clean, and maintain in between uses. They are designed to fit atop a 5 gallon bucket and can be stacked for storage and organization when not in use.

We have several sets available, as well as all individual sizes
Deals Only

Product Details

MPN: TTGP12
UPC: 010131708348
Features: TOOLTREAUX GARDENING SIFTERS - Sifting classifiers are suitable for removing stones and soil before planting; Helps provide a better planting experience while improving efficiency in your garden
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Sifters are made of high-quality ABS plastic and feature 304 stainless steel mesh; Gardening classifiers are easy to use, clean, and maintain in between uses
STACKABLE DESIGN - All sifters fit atop a 5-gallon bucket and can be stacked on top of each other for extra sifting and easy organization after use
COMBO SETS - Set options include: 5pc Combo, 9pc Complete Combo, 3pc Coarse Combo (1/2 , 1/8 and 1/20 Mesh) and 3pc Fine Combo (1/30, 1/70 and 1/100 Mesh)
INDIVIDUAL PAN SIZES - Mesh sizes available: 1/2, 1/4, 1/8, 1/12, 1/20, 1/30, 1/50, 1/70 and 1/100
